lines.speaker: Vermundi
lines.text: Welcome to my clothes stall, can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, what clothes do you have in stock?

lines.speaker: Vermundi
lines.text: Not a lot, I'm afraid, most of what I produce goes to my sister. Her shop is in Keldagrim-West.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, show me what you do have then.
